name: http.listen_address
desc: HTTP bind address for the control-plane API and dashboard.

name: http.root_path
desc: URL prefix when behind a path-rewriting reverse proxy (empty = none).

name: http.agent_root_path
desc: URL prefix for the agent gRPC-gateway when fronted separately.

name: http.panel_allowed_cidrs
desc: Comma-separated CIDRs allowed to reach the panel API (empty = no restriction).

name: http.trusted_proxy_cidrs
desc: Trusted reverse-proxy CIDRs whose X-Forwarded-For headers are honoured.

name: grpc.listen_address
desc: gRPC bind address for the agent gateway.

name: tls.mode
desc: TLS termination mode. proxy = terminate at reverse proxy; direct = serve TLS from the panel.

name: tls.cert_file
desc: PEM certificate path when tls.mode=direct.

name: tls.key_file
desc: PEM private key path when tls.mode=direct.

name: panel.restart_mode
desc: Self-restart capability. supervised requires a process supervisor.

name: panel.env
desc: Deployment environment. production tightens defaults (cookies, HSTS, ws origin).

name: panel.multi_tenant
desc: Enable per-fleet-group scoping for non-admin users.

name: storage.driver
desc: Storage backend driver. Use postgres for production deployments.

name: storage.dsn
desc: Storage data source name. Required. SQLite path or postgres URL.

name: storage.db_password
desc: Postgres password override. Env-only — keeps the secret out of config files.

name: storage.allow_insecure_db
desc: Permit Postgres DSNs with sslmode=disable. Env-only safety guard.

name: storage.allow_empty_db_password
desc: Permit empty Postgres password. Env-only safety guard for development only.

name: auth.encryption_key
desc: Master at-rest encryption key. Required. No default, no TOML.

name: auth.force_secure_cookie
desc: Override the auto-detected Secure cookie flag. Env-only.

name: auth.hsts_preload
desc: Emit the preload directive in HSTS headers. Env-only.

name: observability.log_level
desc: Logger verbosity.

name: observability.log_file
desc: Path to log file. Empty = stderr only.

name: observability.pprof_addr
desc: pprof listener host:port. Empty disables pprof.

name: observability.metrics_scrape_token
desc: Bearer token required to scrape /metrics. Env-only.

name: updates.install_script_url
desc: Override default agent install-script URL emitted by /api/agents/{id}/install-command.

name: agent.client_data_concurrency
desc: Per-agent concurrency for the panel-side client-data fetcher.

name: http.public_url
desc: Externally visible URL of the panel; used in agent install scripts.

name: grpc.public_endpoint
desc: Externally visible gRPC endpoint for agents to dial.

name: auth.password_min_length
desc: Minimum length for newly created or rotated passwords.

name: retention
desc: Retention policy: how long to keep audit events, metrics, jobs, presence rows.

name: geoip
desc: GeoIP data source mode (off/local/url) and database paths.

name: updates.channel
desc: Release channel used to discover panel + agent updates.

name: updates.allow_prerelease
desc: Permit prerelease tags in the chosen channel.
